data.acceptance:
1. The stale-grooming detail panel displays the agent name and version string for the affected session.
2. Last-output timestamp is shown as both an absolute time and a relative label (e.g. "14 minutes ago").
3. Elapsed time since the session was marked stale is shown and refreshes on panel reload.
4. All three fields are present only on sessions in a stale state; healthy sessions are unaffected.
5. Fields render correctly when any value is unavailable (e.g. agent version unknown) — no blank panel or crash.

Validation: Use Playwright MCP (`mcp__playwright__browser_snapshot`, `mcp__playwright__browser_take_screenshot`) to open a stale session's detail panel and assert the agent name, last-output time, and stale-duration fields are present and non-empty in the rendered DOM.
